faq.title: Perguntas Frequentes
faq.a4: Sim, todos os dados são encriptados.
faq.q5: O que é o EventBliss Premium?
faq.a5: Premium desbloqueia funcionalidades avançadas: sugestões IA ilimitadas, perguntas de inquérito personalizadas, modelos de mensagens avançados e suporte prioritário.
faq.a6: Sim! Por um pagamento único de 19,99€ obténs acesso vitalício a todas as funcionalidades premium.
faq.q7: Como funciona o diretório de agências?
faq.a7: Encontra agências profissionais de despedidas em mais de 50 cidades. Filtra por país, cidade e consulta detalhes diretamente no mapa interativo.

kickoff.title: Mensagem de Início
kickoff.description: Primeiro convite a todos os participantes
kickoff.template:
Olá a todos! 🎉

É agora - estamos a planear a despedida de solteiro do {{honoree}}! 🥳

Para nos ajudar a organizar o evento perfeito, precisamos da vossa opinião!

👉 Por favor preencham este breve inquérito:
{{surveyLink}}

🔑 Código de acesso: {{accessCode}}

O inquérito demora apenas 2-3 minutos e ajuda-nos com:
📅 Seleção de data
💰 Planeamento de orçamento
🎯 Seleção de atividades
📍 Escolha do destino

Quanto mais rápido todos responderem, mais rápido podemos começar! 🚀

Perguntas? Digam-me!

Abraço! 🙌

reminder.title: Lembrete
reminder.template:
Olá! 👋

Lembrete rápido sobre o inquérito para a festa do {{honoree}}!

🔗 {{surveyLink}}
🔑 Código: {{accessCode}}

Até agora {{responseCount}} de {{totalCount}} responderam.

Por favor preencham para podermos continuar a planear! 🙏

Demora só 2 minutos! ⏱️

deadline.title: Aviso de Prazo
deadline.description: Última chance antes de fechar o inquérito

dateConfirmed.title: Data Confirmada!
dateConfirmed.template:
🎉 A DATA ESTÁ DEFINIDA! 🎉

A festa do {{honoree}} será a:

📅 {{eventDate}}

Por favor marquem esta data nos vossos calendários e mantenham-na livre!

Mais detalhes em breve... 👀

Perguntas? Digam-me!

budget.title: Info de Orçamento
budget.template:
💰 ATUALIZAÇÃO DE ORÇAMENTO 💰

Aqui estão os custos estimados para a festa do {{honoree}}:

📊 Custo estimado por pessoa: {{budgetPerPerson}}€

Isto inclui:
• [Atividade 1]
• [Atividade 2]
• [Alojamento/Transporte]

Por favor transfiram {{depositAmount}}€ de entrada até {{depositDeadline}}.

Dados bancários:
[Inserir IBAN]

Perguntas sobre o orçamento? Digam-me!

packingList.title: Lista de Bagagem
packingList.template:
🎒 LISTA DE BAGAGEM para a festa do {{honoree}} 🎒

📅 {{eventDate}}
📍 [Destino]

✅ ESSENCIAIS:
• Documento de identidade
• Dinheiro (aprox. {{cashAmount}}€)
• [Roupa especial]
• Boa disposição! 😄

👕 CÓDIGO DE VESTUÁRIO:
[Inserir código de vestuário]

❌ NÃO ESQUECER:
• [Item importante]
• [Outra coisa importante]

Perguntas? Digam-me!

Preparem-se para um evento incrível! 🚀

gamesLibrary.noResults: Nenhum jogo encontrado. Tenta outros filtros.

bingo_tasks.name: Bingo de Desafios
bingo_tasks.description: Cada um recebe um cartão de bingo com desafios divertidos para completar na cidade.
bingo_tasks.instructions: Cria cartões de bingo com diferentes desafios. O grupo percorre a cidade a tentar completá-los. Quem completar uma linha primeiro ganha!

beer_pong.name: Beer Pong
beer_pong.description: O clássico - atira a bola para os copos do adversário.
beer_pong.instructions: Coloca copos em triângulo. As equipas atiram à vez. Acerto = adversário bebe. Equipa sem copos perde.

truth_or_dare.name: Verdade ou Consequência
truth_or_dare.description: O clássico para confissões ousadas e desafios loucos.
truth_or_dare.instructions: À vez cada um escolhe: Verdade ou Consequência. Recusar = castigo!

karaoke_battle.name: Batalha de Karaoke
karaoke_battle.instructions: Equipas ou indivíduos competem. O grupo vota. Pontos pela performance!

shoe_game.name: Jogo do Sapato
shoe_game.description: Os noivos respondem às perguntas com sapatos.
shoe_game.instructions: O casal senta-se costas com costas, cada um com o seu sapato e um do parceiro. Nas perguntas levantam o sapato de quem corresponde.

scavenger_hunt.name: Caça ao Tesouro
scavenger_hunt.description: Segue as pistas e resolve enigmas.
scavenger_hunt.instructions: Esconde pistas que levam ao próximo local. No final espera um tesouro!

charades.name: Mímica
charades.description: Adivinha palavras através de mímica em equipas.
charades.instructions: Um jogador representa um conceito sem falar. A equipa deve adivinhar no tempo.

profile.partyModeDisclaimer: EventBliss não se responsabiliza pelo consumo de bebidas alcoólicas.
profile.partyModeActivatedDesc: A partir de agora bebes em vez de receber um castigo

calendarSync.regenerateConfirm: Invalidar o token antigo e criar um novo?

availabilityEditor.copySuccess: Horários de segunda copiados para todos os dias
availabilityEditor.copyEmpty: Segunda não tem horários para copiar

nativeDrinks.title: Party Stats
nativeDrinks.waterReminderDesc: Un vaso de agua por cada bebida.

bomb.title: Ticking Bomb
bomb.tagline: Answer questions before the bomb explodes — pure adrenaline!
bomb.step1: The bomb ticks and gets passed to a player
bomb.step2: Answer the question correctly before time runs out
bomb.step3: Wrong answer or too slow? BOOM — you're out!
bomb.step4: Last player standing wins the round
bomb.tip: Don't overthink it — the bomb waits for no one!

taboo.title: Taboo
taboo.tagline: Describe words — but watch out, certain words are absolutely TABOO!
taboo.step1: You see a word and 5 forbidden words
taboo.step2: Describe the word to your team — WITHOUT using the taboo words
taboo.step3: Your team must guess before time runs out
taboo.step4: Each correct guess earns a point
taboo.tip: Creativity beats logic — think outside the box!

headup.title: Heads Up
headup.tagline: Phone on forehead, friends describe, you guess — sounds easy? Think again!
headup.step1: Hold your phone to your forehead — you can't see the word
headup.step2: Your friends describe the word to you
headup.step3: Guessed right? Tilt phone forward! Wrong? Tilt back!
headup.step4: Get as many words as possible before time's up
headup.tip: Don't drop your phone — happens more often than you'd think!

category.title: Speed Category
category.tagline: Name things in a category — hesitate and you're out! Speed counts!
category.step1: A category is shown (e.g., "Animals starting with A")
category.step2: Each player takes turns naming a matching item
category.step3: Can't think of one or too slow? You get a point

emojiguess.title: Emoji Guess
emojiguess.tagline: Decode emojis, guess the answer — looks easy but it's not!
emojiguess.step1: You're shown emojis that represent something
emojiguess.step2: Guess which movie, song, or celeb the emojis show
emojiguess.step3: The faster you guess, the more points you get
emojiguess.tip: Think blockbusters — the obvious answer is often right!

fakeorfact.title: Fake or Fact
fakeorfact.tagline: Is that really true? Spot the fake facts — trust nothing!
fakeorfact.step1: A statement is shown to you
fakeorfact.step2: Decide: Is it TRUE or FAKE?
fakeorfact.step3: After your answer, you'll see the explanation
fakeorfact.tip: The craziest facts are usually true!

truthdare.title: Truth or Dare
truthdare.tagline: The party classic — answer honestly or do an embarrassing dare? Your choice!
truthdare.step2: Truth: Answer the question honestly (no matter how embarrassing!)
truthdare.step4: Then it's the next player's turn
truthdare.tip: Dares get bolder with every drink — we didn't say that!

thisorthat.title: This or That
thisorthat.tagline: Pizza or Pasta? Netflix or Cinema? Tough choices ahead!
thisorthat.step3: Compare answers — who's in the majority?
thisorthat.tip: There are no wrong answers — just heated debates!

whoami.title: Who Am I?
whoami.tagline: Ask yes/no questions and figure out who you are — Sherlock would be proud!
whoami.step1: Each player gets a secret person/character assigned
whoami.step2: Ask yes/no questions: "Am I real?" "Am I famous?"
whoami.step3: Combine the clues and guess who you are
whoami.tip: Start broad — "Am I a woman?" eliminates 50%!

bottlespin.title: Spin the Bottle
bottlespin.tagline: The bottle spins... who will it point to? Fun and suspense guaranteed!
bottlespin.step2: Whoever it points to must answer a question or do a task
bottlespin.tip: Luck decides — no tactics can help you here!

storybuilder.title: Story Builder
storybuilder.tagline: Write the craziest story together — creativity without limits!
storybuilder.step1: A story starter sets the scene
storybuilder.step2: Each player adds one sentence in turns
storybuilder.step3: At the end, the complete story is read aloud
storybuilder.tip: The more absurd your twist, the funnier the story!

sharedquiz.title: Shared Quiz
sharedquiz.tagline: Team quiz battle — who knows more? Show what you've got!
sharedquiz.step1: A question is shown to all players at once
sharedquiz.step2: Everyone picks their answer — no conferring!
sharedquiz.tip: Sometimes the most unlikely answer is the right one!

quickdraw.title: Quick Draw
quickdraw.tagline: Draw fast, guess faster — Picasso would be proud (or horrified)!
quickdraw.step1: You're shown a word to draw
quickdraw.step2: Draw as fast as possible — stick figures are fine!
quickdraw.step4: Faster guesses = more points for everyone
quickdraw.tip: Forget art class — speed is everything here!

splitquiz.title: Split Quiz
splitquiz.tagline: Split knowledge — everyone sees different answers, but only one is right!
splitquiz.step2: Each player sees different answer options
splitquiz.step3: Discuss which answer could be correct
splitquiz.step4: Only the one with the right answer scores
splitquiz.tip: Trust your gut — or the nerd in your group!

hochstapler.title: The Impostor
hochstapler.tagline: One person has no clue — find the impostor! Or be one yourself...
hochstapler.step1: All players get a secret word — ONE gets a different one
hochstapler.step2: Each player describes the word with a single term
hochstapler.step3: Everyone votes: Who is the impostor?
hochstapler.step4: Impostor caught? Others win. Impostor survives? They win!
hochstapler.tip: As the impostor: Be vague enough to blend in, but specific enough to not seem suspicious!

wo-ist-was.title: Where Is It?
wo-ist-was.tagline: 5 different modes — from Memory to Speed to Street View! Geography & observation!
wo-ist-was.step1: Choose one of 5 modes: Memory, Speed, Differences, Map or Street View
wo-ist-was.step2: Memory: Memorize the emoji scene, then answer questions about it
wo-ist-was.step3: Speed: The scene stays visible — who finds the answer fastest?
wo-ist-was.step4: Map: Find cities and countries on the world map — closer = more points
wo-ist-was.step5: Street View: You see a photo — guess which city you are in!
wo-ist-was.tip: In Map mode: Europe is smaller than you think — and Australia is bigger!

flaschendrehen.title: Spin the Bottle
flaschendrehen.tagline: The classic party game! Who will the bottle choose?
flaschendrehen.step1: The bottle spins in the middle
flaschendrehen.step2: Whoever it points to is up
flaschendrehen.step3: Answer the question or complete the dare
flaschendrehen.tip: Karma spins the bottle — be nice to your fellow players!

drueck-das-wort.title: Press the Word
drueck-das-wort.tagline: Find the right word under time pressure — one wrong tap and it gets tight!
drueck-das-wort.step1: You are shown a target word
drueck-das-wort.step2: Tap the correct word from the options — fast!
drueck-das-wort.step3: Correct? Next word! Wrong? Points deducted!
drueck-das-wort.step4: Most correct words at the end wins
drueck-das-wort.tip: Don't tap frantically — one wrong click costs more than a second of thinking!

modes.memoryDesc: Memorize a cena e responda perguntas
modes.mapDesc: Encontre cidades e países no mapa-múndi
